title: Violent Villagers
description: Give villagers more reasons to be irritated by you
body:
This is a mod that gives villagers more of a personality. Installing it will change 2 things in your world
1) Villagers will now make an attempt on your life if your reputation with them drops below a specified amount, 0 by default
2) Villagers now have more valid reasons to get angry at you like for example
 - Opening chests near them. Specifically, if you open a chest near their job site or home, you lose reputation. Don't loot villagers 
 - If you have the Carrier mod installed and you attempt lift said chest, you will make the villager angry
